nasb.text: I will also make the land drink the discharge of your blood As far as the mountains, And the ravines will be full of you.

esv.text: I will drench the land even to the mountains with your flowing blood, and the ravines will be full of you.

cnv.text: 我必用你流出的血澆灌地面， 直到山上， 水溝都必充滿你的血。

ccb.text: 用你的血浇灌大地， 漫过群山，溢满沟壑。
